title: AMD is investing $5 billion in Anthropic and deploying 2 gigawatts of Helios GPUs to run Claude
summary: AMD and Anthropic announced a strategic partnership on Tuesday that commits AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic and deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in Helios rackscale solutions to run Claude.
